## Checklist

- [ ] `bun run check` passes locally (lint + format + typecheck + tests)
- [ ] New/changed behavior is covered by a test
- [ ] DB changes include a Drizzle-generated migration in `src/db/migrations/`
- [ ] No secrets in the diff (`.env*`, keys, tokens)
- [ ] Docs updated if user-facing behavior changed (README / CONTRIBUTING / deploy/README)
